station.title: Student feedback layer
station.description: Student-facing root causes, recommendations, and feedback text.

metrics.adaptive_feedback:
=== FOR YOUR PROFILE (Efficient Learners - Low effort, acceptable results) ===
Focus on consistent effort and reflection on your writing.

=== KEY INSIGHT ===
No critical writing issue detected right now. Focus on enrichment and consistency in future tasks.

=== RULE-BASED DIAGNOSTIC FEEDBACK ===
Excellent! Seeking assistance demonstrates awareness of your learning needs and a strong commitment to improvement.
Dialogic scaffolding

=== RECOMMENDED INTERVENTIONS ===
تقديم إثراء إضافي; جلسة حوار توضيحي; تشجيع وتعزيز السلوك الإيجابي
Clarification conference
مواد متقدمة وتحديات إضافية
تعزيز وإثراء
help_seeking_examples: Hi dear miss Seha ftourek I sent you the body paragraph, but I was in a hurry. I sent it after iftar that’s why so I didn’t see the structures for writing the body paragraph. I wanted to change it for you, but I couldn’t I will send you here if you want

In addition to simplifying the writing process, AI can help students improve their writing skills. Many university students find writing difficult because they cannot organize their ideas well and they often make grammar mistakes. AI tools can support students by giving suggestions, correcting errors, and helping them create clearer sentences. Some educational studies show that these tools can guide students during the writing process and make learning easier. For example, a student can use an AI tool to check a paragraph and see corrections for grammar, vocabulary, and sentence structure. By looking at these corrections, the student can understand the mistakes and learn how to avoid them in the future. This learning process helps students become more confident in their writing. Therefore, AI can play an important role in helping university students develop stronger writing skills.
